channel.title: Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Parlor Room on Dropout.tv

item.title: Crudites, Crudita, Crudite-ha-ha-ha
item.description:
Raph, Katie, Jess, Jess, and Tao become spymasters and play the board game Codenames.

Duration: 43:11

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, raphael chestang, katie marovitch, jessica ross, jessica clemons, tao yang
